results.evidence: All three test cases passed: (1) issueUpdate with non-UUID 'nonexistent' returned {success:false, issue:null}, (2) issueUpdate with UUID-format 00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000 returned {success:false, issue:null}, (3) issueUpdate with 'not-a-valid-uuid-at-all' returned {success:false, issue:null}. No server crashes, no unhandled errors.
